agency: Health insurance association / Employer (健康保険組合 / 事業主)
nameEn: Employee Health Insurance Card — All Household Members (copy)
nameJa: 世帯全員分の健康保険被保険者証（写し）
conditionNote: Submit if currently enrolled in Employee Health Insurance (健康保険). If enrolled continuously for the entire past 2 years, items #13–#15 are not needed.
noteEn: Redact insurer number (保険者番号) and insured person symbol/number (被保険者等記号・番号) before submitting.
noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。直近2年間すべて健康保険に加入していた方は13〜15は不要。
